pi_items.source: Task instructions and verification script strictly require this output file name.
Task instructions and verification script export_result.sh strictly require this path.
Task instructions require checking in Alice Safety and Bruce Hazard and leaving them checked in.
Task instructions explicitly require checking out Charlie Drill, who therefore must not appear in the evacuation list.
Task instructions assign OSHA Inc to Alice Safety and Risk Corp to Bruce Hazard, so these companies must remain in the evacuation list.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an evacuation list from manually entered data. The final file must be named evacuation_list.csv and located at /home/ga/Documents/evacuation_list.csv. It must include the checked-in visitors Alice Safety (from OSHA Inc) and Bruce Hazard (from Risk Corp), but exclude Charlie Drill (who is checked out).
